## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's travel preferences and optimize meeting scheduling processes.](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel prefers Delta (1st) and United (2nd) airlines, with SFO as primary airport](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Family travel requires special considerations (e.g., flight timing, seating arrangements)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Calendar management needs improvement (buffer times, travel details, comprehensive day planning)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Zoom is preferred over Google Meets; delegation of Zoom account access needed](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

## Topics

### Travel Preferences

  - [Airlines: Delta (1st choice), United (2nd choice)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Airport: SFO primary, Oakland acceptable for solo travel](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [TSA Pre-Check and Global Entry (wife's needs fixing)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Meal preference: No pork (especially for wife)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Transportation: Uber for work, car rental (Hertz) for family trips](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Flights: Non-stop preferred, layovers are "deal-breakers" for family travel](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Seating strategy: Book window + aisle, hoping for empty middle seat](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Timing: Align with daughter's sleep schedule (11 AM - 1/2 PM nap, 6:30-7 PM bedtime)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Baggage: Carry-on for solo trips, checked bags for family travel](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [In-flight: Purchases Wi-Fi when available](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Need for comprehensive day planning in calendar](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Include travel times, parking considerations, and buffer times](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Adjust event timings to prevent accidental bookings (e.g., move ASU workshop earlier)](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Account for traffic patterns when estimating travel times](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### Work Overload

  - [Marcel and Jimmy are "drowning" with workload](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

  - [Open to suggestions and proactive assistance from Alice](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Video Conferencing

  - [Need to research Zoom account delegation for improved management](https://fathom.video/share/zcay-z1ii9QEj-mYUYuM5RkypRLi4m4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Pet Care
